channel.title: HeroQuest Club
channel.description: Recent content in Fl on HeroQuest Club

item.title: First Light
item.description:
The board is 0 wide and 0 high.
The squares are in size.
It folds into 6 sections.

item.title: Game System
item.description:
The board is 0 wide and 0 high.
The squares are in size.
It folds into 4 sections.

item.title: The Scout
item.description:
Movment = 9
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 2

Cost: 50 gold coins
Special Ability:Dwarf-like ability to remove traps

Image not found: /allies/the-scout.png

item.title: The Halberdier
item.description:
Movment = 6
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 2

Cost: 75 gold coins
Special Ability:Can make diagonal attacks

Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 5
Body Points = 2

Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 2

Cost: 75 gold coins

item.title: Orc Archer
item.description:
Movment = 8
Attack Dice = 3*
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 1
Mind Points = 2


*Against non-adjacent targets. The Orc Archer rolls 1 Attack die agaist adjacent targets.

Image not found: /bestiary/orc-archer.png

item.description:

Attack Dice = 6
Defend Dice = 6
Body Points = 10

item.description:

Attack Dice = 3*
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 1


* The wolf may attack diagonally.

item.title: Skeleton Archer
item.description:
Movment = 6
Attack Dice = 2*
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 1
Mind Points = 0


*Against non-adjacent targets. The Skeleton Archer rolls 1 Attack die agaist adjacent targets.

Image not found: /bestiary/skeleton-archer.png

item.title: Goblin Archer
item.description:
Movment = 10
Attack Dice = 2*
Defend Dice = 1
Body Points = 1
Mind Points = 1


*Against non-adjacent targets. The Goblin Archer rolls 1 Attack die against adjacent targets.

item.title: Giant Ape
item.description:
Movment = 8
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 5

Agile.

item.title: Serpent
item.description:
Movment = 8
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 3

Spawn. Venomous.

item.title: Skullblight
item.description:
Movment = 6
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 0

Entangling Roots.

Image not found: /bestiary/skullblight.png

item.title: Spawnling
item.description:
Movment = 3
Attack Dice = 0
Defend Dice = 0
Body Points = 1
Mind Points = 0

Venomous. Agile.
If a hero ends their turn with a Spawnling tile on their card, they take 1 Body Point of damage for each Spawnling attached to them. This damage cannot be defended against.

Image not found: /bestiary/spawnling.png

item.title: Blightweaver
item.description:
Movment = 7
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 1
Mind Points = 2


Each Blightweaver may cast each of the following Dread spells once per quest: Channel Dread and Creeping Grasp.

Image not found: /bestiary/blightweaver.png

item.title: Raptor
item.description:
Movment = 8
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 3

Clever Tactician.

Image not found: /bestiary/raptor.png

item.title: Blightcrawler
item.description:
Movment = 7
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 4
Body Points = 3
Mind Points = 4

Spawn. Agile. Venomous.

Image not found: /bestiary/blightcrawler.png

item.title: Raptor
item.description:
Movment = 8
Attack Dice = 2*
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 3
Mind Points = 3


* The Raptor may move before and after making an attack

The Raptor is a faithful animal ally. They're bonded to one hero and take their turn immediately following the turn of their allied hero. They can move, attack, and defend, but cannot perform other actions or use potions. They have a unique talent for opening doors.

Image not found: /allies/raptor.png

item.title: Saberfang
item.description:
Movment = 10
Attack Dice = 2*
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 1


* The Saberfang may attack diagonally.

The Saberfang is a faithful animal ally. They're bonded to one hero and take their turn immediately following the turn of their allied hero. They can move, attack, and defend, but cannot perform other actions, use potions, or open doors. The Saberfang moves unaffected through squares containing hindering terrain and revealed pit traps.

Image not found: /allies/saberfang.png

item.title: Sir Ragnar
item.description:
Movment = 7
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 5
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 2


Image not found: /bestiary/sir-ragnar.png

item.title: Dreadshifter
item.description:
Movment = 5
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 2
Mind Points = 4


Ambush-Place this monster onto the board as the object it appears to be (eg. a chest, a door). The first time a hero moves into the 8 squares surrounding this object, replace it with the corresponding Ambush monster miniature. It may move and attack immediately.

Image not found: /bestiary/dreadshifter.png

item.title: Golem
item.description:
Movment = 5
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 5
Body Points = 3
Mind Points = 0


Image not found: /bestiary/golem.png

item.title: Minotaur
item.description:
Movment = 7
Attack Dice = 4
Defend Dice = 5
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 4


Gore-In addition to their own turn, a minotaur may immediately roll 2 Attack dice against a hero who ends their turn in one of the 10 spaces surrounding it. A minotaur may not gore if they are incapacitated.

Image not found: /bestiary/minotaur.png

item.title: Dragon
item.description:
Movment = 10
Attack Dice = 5
Defend Dice = 5
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 6


The dragon uses Draconic Flight and may cast Ball of Flame at will.

Image not found: /bestiary/dragon.png

item.title: Explorer
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 5

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Handaxe
Starting Armor = None

You are the explorer, a tenacious adventurer with a knack for finding that which is hidden. You don't wear metal armor so as to nimbly avoid traps. Like the dwarf, you're able to disarm traps without the use of a tool kit. When you do so, roll a combat die. If you roll a black shieldm you fail; on any other roll result, you succeed.

Treasure Hunter
Danger Sense
Trapsmith

Image not found: /heroes/explorer.png

item.title: Berserker
item.description:
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Broadsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the Berserker, a powerful fighter who grows stronger as the odds become more dire. You know how to channel pain and fury into deft power. Because you like to het up close and personal in combat, you do not use ranged weapons.

Frenzy
Retaliation
Enrage

Image not found: /heroes/berserker.png

item.description: Image not found: /amazon/wizards-of-morcar.png

item.title: The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness
item.description:
Image not found: /amazon/the-crypt-of-perpetual-darkness.png

Avalon Hill Item : G1798 Avalon Hill HeroQuest Joe Manganiello’s The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness Quest Pack (Requires HeroQuest Game System) Ages : 14 YEARS+ MSRP : $34.99 Buy Now Direct : Pulse logo Buy Now Other Options to Buy Now : WHERE TO BUY DOWNLOAD INSTRUCTIONS : https://shop.hasbro.com/api/download/G1798_en-us PRODUCT DESCRIPTION The adventure continues with the premium HeroQuest Joe Manganiello’s The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness Quest Pack! Zargon’s minions are at your doorstep, threatening the place you call home. Armed only with your effects and an ancient map of elvish origin, you must journey deep underground in search of a long-lost crypt rumored to contain a powerful artifact. Keep this treasure from Zargon—you’re the only hope of your people! This edition includes 10 epic quests designed by Joe Manganiello, 1 metallic black dragon miniature, 8 black dice, 1 pad of character sheets, 20 foil-embellished game cards, and 2 cardboard tile sheets. With this thrilling strategy game, enjoy limitless replayability and create your own quests and stories. Gather friends together for an exciting night of tabletop gameplay in a battle of good and evil. For 2-5 players, ages 14+. (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) HeroQuest, Avalon Hill, and Hasbro, and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

• PREMIUM HEROQUEST EXPANSION: Joe Manganiello’s The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness Quest Pack is a premium version of the edition previously only available to crowd funders of the HeroQuest relaunch! (Requires HeroQuest Game System. Sold separately.) • SAVE YOUR HOMELAND FROM THE FORCES OF DREAD: A fallen knight’s tomb is rumored to contain a powerful artifact. Embark on a perilous journey to the long-lost crypt, and keep the treasure from Zargon • 10 QUESTS CREATED BY JOE MANGANIELLO: 10 harrowing quests by game designer Joe Manganiello will see you and your companions venturing into darkness, vanquishing terrible foes, and encountering unlikely allies • METALLIC DRAGON MINIATURE: This tabletop game expansion pack comes with a premium, finely detailed black metallic dragon miniature to add to your collection • FOIL-EMBELLISHED CARDS AND PACKAGE: Includes 20 game cards—the first-ever HeroQuest cards with holographic foil treatment—and a foil-embellished package. The cards also feature chilling custom artwork • ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY: With this pack, expand your HeroQuest Game System for limitless replayability! You can also create your own stories and design your own quests • GIFT FOR ROLEPLAYING GAME FANS AND COLLECTORS: An epic addition to any HeroQuest collection, this adventure game is a great gift for fans of cooperative games, fantasy board games, and strategy games. For adults and teens ages 14+ • Includes Quest book featuring 10 quests, 1 metallic black dragon miniature, 8 black dice, 1 pad of character sheets, 20 foil-embellished cards, 2 cardboard tile sheets, and game guide.

Ages 14 and up For 2 to 5 players. Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. (Sold separately. Subject to availability.)

item.title: First Light
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/first-light.png

item.title: Jungles of Delthrak
item.description:
Image not found: /amazon/jungles-of-delthrak.png

Left ArrowRight Arrow Avalon Hill Item : F9907 Avalon Hill HeroQuest Jungles of Delthrak Quest Pack, Requires HeroQuest Game System to Play Ages : 14 YEARS+ MSRP : $31.49 WHERE TO BUY DOWNLOAD INSTRUCTIONS: https://shop.hasbro.com/api/download/F9907_en-us PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

The adventure continues with the HeroQuest Jungles of Delthrak Quest Pack! In the dense jungle surrounding the mountains at World’s Edge, an ancient dwarven civilization finds new roots. A sacred artifact prized by the dwarven refugees of Kellar’s Keep has been stolen, and a blight has infected the jungle to its roots. As a powerful Berserker or Explorer hero, traverse the jungles and discover what vile secret looms beneath its canopy – before all is lost! Follow your path to unique endings through a choose-your-own adventure mechanic. Includes a Quest Book featuring 16 quests, 36 illustrated game cards, 29 detailed miniatures, and 39 double-sided cardboard pieces. (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately. Subject to availability.) This game has limitless replayability, and you can create your own quests and stories. Gather friends together for an exciting night of tabletop gameplay in a battle of good and evil. For 2-5 players, ages 14 and up. HeroQuest, Avalon Hill, and Hasbro, and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

•HEROQUEST EXPANSION PACK: This Jungles of Delthrak Quest Pack features 16 quests, a choose-your-own-adventure mechanic, and the introduction of the Berserker and Explorer heroes! (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) •WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE: Venture into dangerous jungles, where a powerful dwarven relic has been stolen and something nefarious has infected the land. Investigate the blight and uproot the curse •ADD TO YOUR COLLECTION OF MINIATURES: This tabletop board game expansion comes with 29 detailed miniatures: a Giant Ape, Serpent, Blightcrawler, Goblin Warlock, and more! Plus 39 full-color cardboard pieces •16 THRILLING QUESTS: Includes 16 original quests, set in a perilous land of monsters, traps, and mind-bending spells. The Quest Book and 36 game cards feature artwork that immerses you in the daring adventure •CHOOSE YOUR OWN ADVENTURE: This fantasy expansion pack features an innovative, choose-your-own adventure mechanic with 3 distinct endings based on your decisions •ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY: With this pack, expand your HeroQuest Game System for limitless replayability! Players can also create their own stories and design their own quests •GIFT FOR ROLEPLAYING GAME FANS AND COLLECTORS: An epic addition to any HeroQuest collection, this expansion is a great gift for fans of cooperative games, fantasy board games, and strategy games. Ages 14+

•Ages 14 and up •For 2 to 5 players. •Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. (Sold separately. Subject to availability.) •Includes Quest book featuring 16 quests, 29 finely detailed miniatures, 36 game cards, 39 cardboard pieces, and instructions.

item.title: Against the Ogre Horde
item.description:
Image not found: /amazon/against-the-ogre-horde.png

Avalon Hill Item : F9528 Avalon Hill Heroquest Against the Ogre Horde Quest Pack, Requires HeroQuest Game System to Play Ages : 14 YEARS+ MSRP : $44.99 Buy Now Direct : Pulse logo Buy Now Other Options to Buy Now : WHERE TO BUY DOWNLOAD INSTRUCTIONS: https://shop.hasbro.com/api/download/F9528_en-us PRODUCT DESCRIPTION The adventure continues with the HeroQuest Against the Ogre Horde Quest pack! Zargon’s latest plot has ensnared the Dirgrusht horde, a powerful and secretive clan of ogres to the north, that have become increasingly violent. As a formidable Druid hero, you must enter the World’s End Arena to prove your mettle as a warrior, locate the hidden lair of the ogre horde, and weed out the root of corruption at the heart of their clan. Will you save the realm and live to tell the tale? Immerse yourself in the fantasy with 10 perilous quests, stunning artwork, 28 detailed miniatures, and full-color tiles. (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) This game has limitless replayability; you can also create your own quests and stories. Gather friends together for an exciting night of tabletop gameplay in an epic battle of good and evil. The game is for 2-5 players, ages 14 and up. Avalon Hill and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

•HEROQUEST EXPANSION PACK: This Against the Ogre Horde Quest Pack is the awaited re-release of the original with fresh features, such as 7 modernized classic quests, 3 original quests, and tournament gameplay! (Requires HeroQuest game system to play. Sold separately.) •STOP THE OGRE HORDE: Journey into the hidden society of ogres to stop Zargon’s evil influence from corrupting them! The cards and Quest Book in this fantasy expansion feature artwork that immerses you in the daring adventure •ADD TO YOUR COLLECTION OF MINIATURES: This tabletop board game expansion comes with 28 modernized detailed miniatures: Ogre Warriors, an Ogre Commander, an Ogre Lord, Druid Heroes, and more •INCLUDES 10 THRILLING QUESTS: This expansion features 10 quests, including 3 fresh ones, set in a secluded land of monsters, traps, and mind-altering spells. It also comes with full-color tiles and 29 game cards •PLAYER VS. PLAYER ARENA BATTLE: Compete against other players to prove your merit in World’s End Tournament battles. The team left standing wins! Includes an arena title sheet •ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY: Delve deeper into the HeroQuest world with this expansion pack that adds to the game’s infinite replayability. Players can create their own stories and design their own quests •GIFT FOR ROLEPLAYING GAME FANS AND COLLECTORS: An epic addition to any HeroQuest collection, this expansion is a great gift for fans of cooperative games, fantasy board games, and strategy games. Ages 14+

•Ages 14 and up •For 2 to 5 players. •Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. (Sold separately.) •Includes Quest book featuring 10 quests, 28 finely detailed miniatures, 29 game cards, 29 cardboard tiles, and instructions.

item.title: Path of the Wondering Monk
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/path-of-the-wondering-monk.png

item.title: Prophecy of Telor
item.description:
Image not found: /amazon/prophecy-of-telor.png

DOWNLOAD INSTRUCTIONS: https://shop.hasbro.com/api/download/G0052_en-us PRODUCT INFO Mysterious arcane forces are interfering with Mentor’s magic. In this action-packed HeroQuest Prophecy of Telor expansion, return to the rich story of the HeroQuest board game. Traverse through 13 quests to reveal the secrets surrounding the Talisman of Lore and the prophecy of Telor! Though the wizard Melar vanished long ago, it is known that he had been experimenting with vile Dread magic—alas, in his disappearance, all that could be found was the Talisman of Lore. Playing as one of HeroQuest’s brave heroes, you must enter the maze of Melar and put an end to whatever foul machinations are at play! Immerse yourself in the fantasy with 15 detailed miniatures, 14 beautifully illustrated game cards and quest book, and 6 dice. (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) This game has limitless replayability; build your own quests and stories. Gather friends together for an epic battle of good and evil. For 2-5 players, ages 14+.

Includes quest book featuring 13 quests, 15 finely detailed miniatures, 14 game cards, and 6 dice.

EXCITING EXPANSION PACK: Now you can expand your HeroQuest Game System with this Prophecy of Telor Quest Pack, once only available as part of the HeroQuest: Haslab Mythic Tier package (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) HE ADVENTURE CONTINUES: Playing as the warlock hero, unveil the secrets behind the Talisman of Lore and defeat the evil wizard Melar! The 14 game cards and quest book feature artwork that immerses you in the perilous world DD TO YOUR COLLECTION OF MINIATURES: This tabletop board game expansion comes with 15 finely detailed unpainted miniatures, including the warlock hero and fiery orange monster miniatures INCLUDES 13 THRILLING QUESTS: The Prophecy of Telor quest book, written by Stephen Baker, features 13 quests set in ancient locations filled with monsters, spells, and threatening obstacles at every turn ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY: Delve deeper into the HeroQuest world with this expansion pack that adds to the game’s replayability. Players can also create their own stories and design their own quests GREAT GIFT FOR ROLEPLAYING GAME FANS: This HeroQuest expansion pack is an excellent gift for fans of cooperative games, fantasy board games, and adventure games. For 2-5 players, ages 14+

item.title: Spirit Queen's Torment
item.description:
<style>
    body {
      background-image: url('/images/backgrounds/sqt_hu_250ee90990c8019f.webp');
      background-size: cover;
      background-attachment: fixed;
      background-position: center;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
    }

  </style>

item.title: Monk
item.description:
Attack Dice = 1*
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = *When attacking unarmed, roll one additional Attack die.
Starting Armor = None

You are the Monk, a student of unarmed combat techniques formed in reverence of the elements. You refuse to use armor or shields, instead relying on your heightened grace and agility. You may only wield daggers, crossbows, handaxes, shortswords, and staffs.

Soaring Dragon / Eye of the Storm
Twisting Torrent / Tidal Surge
Speak with Stone / Strength of Mountain
Burning Spirit / Touch of Endless Inferno

Image not found: /heroes/monk.png

item.title: Rise of the Dread Moon
item.description:
Image not found: /amazon/rise-of-the-dread-moon.png

Avalon Hill Item : F6646 Avalon Hill HeroQuest Rise of the Dread Moon Quest Pack, Requires HeroQuest Game System, 14+ Ages : 14 YEARS+ MSRP : $44.99 WHERE TO BUY DOWNLOAD INSTRUCTIONS: https://shop.hasbro.com/api/download/F6646_en-us PRODUCT DESCRIPTION The dramatic story of treachery and unrest in the elven kingdom continues in this HeroQuest Rise of the Dread Moon expansion! As a brave knight, you’re challenged to finally free Elethorn from the clutches of Zargorn. Embark on dangerous quests, as you seek the aid of the Cadre of the Raven’s Veil to help stop Zargorn’s forces of Dread from destroying the kingdom. Navigate through a dark labyrinth of waterways, an underground city, and more perilous locations. But be wary—for Zargon’s forces grow ever stronger with the rise of the Dread Moon! Immerse yourself in the adventure with 10 daring quests, stunning artwork, 29 detailed miniatures, and full-color tiles. (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) This fantasy game for adults and teens has limitless replayability, and you can also create your own quests and stories. Gather friends together for an exciting night of tabletop gameplay in a battle of good and evil. The game is for 2-5 players, ages 14+. Avalon Hill and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

•EXPAND YOUR HEROQUEST GAME SYSTEM: This Rise of the Dread Moon Quest Pack concludes the exciting story begun in The Mage of the Mirror expansion! (Requires HeroQuest Game System to play. Sold separately.) •THE EPIC ADVENTURE CONTINUES: Finally free Elethorn from Zargon’s vile clutches! The cards and Quest Book in this fantasy-filled HeroQuest expansion feature artwork that immerses you in the perilous adventure •ADD TO YOUR COLLECTION OF MINIATURES: This tabletop game expansion comes with 29 detailed miniatures, including furniture, Elven Warriors, Dread Cultists, Specters, a Dread Wraith, and more •INCLUDES 10 THRILLING QUESTS: The Rise of Dread Moon expansion features 10 quests, as well as full-color tiles and 58 game cards, set in an elven world of monsters, traps, treasure, and Dread Moon spells •ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY: Delve deeper into the HeroQuest world with this expansion pack that adds to the game’s replayability. Players can also create their own stories and design their own quests •GREAT GIFT FOR ROLEPLAYING GAME FANS: This HeroQuest expansion pack is an excellent gift for fans of cooperative games and adventure games. For 2-5 players, ages 14+

•Ages 14 and up •For 2 to 5 players. •Includes Quest book featuring 10 quests, 29 finely detailed miniatures, 2 mirror stands, 58 game cards, cardboard title sheet, and game guide.

item.title: The Mage of the Mirror
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/the-mage-of-the-mirror.png

item.title: The Rogue Heir of Elethorn

item.title: The Frozen Horror
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/the-frozen-horror.png

item.title: Rogue
item.description:
Attack Dice = 1
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Dagger
Starting Armor = None

You are the Rogue, a nimble skirmisher who is deadly with small blades, but you lack the ability to use metal armor and shields. Equiped with your trusty bandolier, you are always prepared for danger.

Ambidesxtrous
Combat Mobility
Opportunistic Striker
Dagger
Bandolier

Image not found: /heroes/rogue.png

item.title: Game System
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/game-system.png

item.title: Commander of the Guardian Knights
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/commander-of-the-guardian-knights.png

item.title: Return of the Witch Lord
item.description: Image not found: /amazon/return-of-the-witch-lord.png

item.title: Knight
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Shortsword
Starting Armor = Shield

You are the Knight. A well-trained armored fighter always ready to stand between allies and danger. Armor does not restrict your movement speed.

Knight’s Challenge
Shield Block
Stalwart

Image not found: /heroes/knight.png

item.title: Bard
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Rapier
Starting Armor = None

You are the bard. Your spirit and songs inspire and invigorate your alies. You prefer to stay light on your feetso when you are wearing non-metal armor and not carrying a shield you have 1 extra Defend die.

Healing Song Inspiring Tale Lullaby

Image not found: /heroes/bard.png

item.title: Druid
item.description:
Attack Dice = 1
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Dagger
Starting Armor = None

You are the Druid, a woodland guardian and potent healer. You are a powerful physical combatant when under the effects of your shapeshift spell, but you can be weakened when your resources are depleted. You do not wear metal armor.

Lifeforce
Pixie
Shapeshift

Image not found: /heroes/druid.png

item.title: Warlock
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 4
Mind Points = 5

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Wand
Starting Armor = None

You are the warlock, a magical artillerist who has bonded with a sinister creature, allowing you to assume its winged form. Let your allies protect you while you deal damage from afar. Counts as a wizard hero in termso of which weapons, artifacts, and equipment they can use.

Dark Wings
Demon Form
Fear

Image not found: /heroes/warlock.png

item.title: Barbarian
item.description:
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 8
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Broadsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the barbarian, the greatest warrior of all. But beware of magic for your sword is no defense against it.

item.title: Dwarf
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 3

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Shoersword
Starting Armor = None

You are the dwarf. You are a good warrior and have the unique ability to disarm traps without a tool kit. To do so, you must avoid rolling a black shield on a combat die.

item.title: Elf
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Shortsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the elf, a master of both magic and the sword. You must use both well if you are to triumph. You have the power to cast three magical spells, all relating to one element.

Image not found: /heroes/elf.png

item.title: Wizard
item.description:
Attack Dice = 1
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 4
Mind Points = 6

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Dagger
Starting Armor = None

You are the wizard. You have the ability to cast many different spells. However, you cannot wear armor or use large weapons. Therefore, you must cast your spells wisely and avoid physical combat where you are weak.

Image not found: /heroes/wizard.png
